description: CompositionGrey jacket made of 100% cotton, has long raglan sleeves, adidas patented 3-Stripes in black on the shoulders and sleeves, full front zipper closure, two insert pockets on the sides, snipped edges above the hem and has the brand name in distressed print on the left chestFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 40 degreesDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanWarm iron; do not iron on print/trims/logosGear up and upgrade your winter wardrobe with this jacket from adidas. Created from cotton fabric, this jacket is sure to keep you warm and comfy, while you enjoy that hot street food on misty evenings. Layer it over a T-shirt and jeans, add on sports shoes and hit the streets this winter in style.Model statistics The model wears size M in jacketsHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
